questions.q: In late April 2026, Prime Minister Mark Carney announced the creation of the 'Strong Canada Fund'. What type of financial instrument is this?
Ukrainian drones struck Russian oil storage tanks in which city on April 28, 2026, hitting them before flames from previous attacks had even been extinguished?
In late April 2026, which country opened a new museum and memorial complex honoring its soldiers who were killed fighting alongside Russian forces against Ukraine?
On April 27, 2026, which well-known fashion and jewelry retailer ceased trading at all 154 of its standalone stores in the UK and Ireland?
In April 2026, a former local leader of Viktor Orbán’s Fidesz party, Feríz Rádi, was arrested at the Budapest airport in connection with what type of crime?
